tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: Travelling to remote destinations offers 1.1. _________ (1.1) scenery that no photograph can fully capture. Before setting off, experienced travellers recommend getting 1.2. _________ (1.2) with local customs and traditions to avoid cultural misunderstandings. Finding suitable 1.3. _________ (1.3) can be challenging in less touristy areas, though the 1.4. _________ (1.4) of local people often compensates for basic facilities. Many historic hotels have undergone extensive 1.5. _________ (1.5) to meet modern standards while preserving their original charm. Mountain trails can be 1.6. _________ (1.6) for inexperienced hikers, particularly when fog causes complete 1.7. _________ (1.7). The 1.8. _________ (1.8) of new travel routes between previously isolated regions has opened up exciting possibilities for adventurous explorers.
